rules.fix_suggestion: Select the same 2/3/4-view layout family as the original reference drawing for this part.
Create top/right projected drawing views from the base view instead of independent named model views.
Match the same-name reference drawing view type counts instead of adding or replacing view families.
Generate real SolidWorks DisplayDim annotations; do not count Notes, OCR text, or QC sidecar values as DisplayDim.
Compare front/top/right/iso sheet-normalized view centers against the same-name reference drawing.
